orchestrator.terminal_condition: Continue until release_readiness_gap_count equals 0 with every active wall held, the human changes or stops the frame, or a blocking flag requires human resolution.

dkrs.decision_target: Derive the exact published API and documentation coverage matrix that makes public_contract_gap_count mechanically readable.
Decide which performance facts are replayed and which measurement choices still require discovery.
Derive the final Lite execution API contract for ctx.exec dependency operations, explicit params, and the no-context-argument wall.
dkrs.stop_rule: Return the smallest source-backed API and compatibility matrix; do not edit product code.

dkrs.decision_target: Validate one minimal exact-head provenance contract, one allocation calibration method, one retained-memory method, and the smallest representative owned and SDK row set.
dkrs.stop_rule: Return executable calibration and row-selection evidence or fail closed; do not optimize product code.

pkrs.delivery: Add one manifest-driven public-contract checker, a governed exact-head PR snapshot input, fixture coverage, and separate exported-symbol inventory versus policy-denominator metrics.
Repair migration, PR/runtime, captured-exec, package-lane, lint, codemod, and docs-example contract gaps read by PKR-C1.
Add missing changeset coverage for the five changed public packages and align release wording.
Add TSDoc only for the source-backed public-interface denominator and prove built-declaration coverage.
Implement the accepted Lite execution API contract with inferred deps and explicit params, without passing ctx or scope into callbacks.
